Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: We bring in a 2001 ragged out BMW 4 door sedan, with plans of turning it into a mix-use race machine.
Video.title: Track Killing Bimmer ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Image.alt: Track Killing Bimmer ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Video.summary: We pick up the power plant for their grassroots racer and start assembling the heart of the beast.
Video.title: Power Source ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 2

Image.alt: Power Source ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 2
Power Source ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 2
Power Source ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 2

Video.summary: The Carcass guys continue the build of their grassroots BMW race car.
Video.title: Fuel Fiasco ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 3

Image.alt: Fuel Fiasco ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 3
Fuel Fiasco ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 3
Fuel Fiasco ñ Project UnSanctioned Part 3

Video.summary: Our 2001 BMW race car gets a set of coilovers, as well as big brake upgrade.
Video.title: Building the Beast ó Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Image.alt: Building the Beast ó Project UnSanctioned Part 4
Building the Beast ó Project UnSanctioned Part 4
Building the Beast ó Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Video.summary: Project UnSanctioned gets the roll cage painted and then back to the shop for a stylistic wrap.
Video.title: Artistry In Motion ó Project UnSanctioned Part 5

Image.alt: Artistry In Motion ó Project UnSanctioned Part 5
Artistry In Motion ó Project UnSanctioned Part 5
Artistry In Motion ó Project UnSanctioned Part 5

Video.summary: What started as a simple ìaerosol overhaulî gets more complicated!
Video.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

Video.summary: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets an upgraded suspension that can handle the trails.
Video.title: Junk Mail Suspension

Video.summary: We start the reassembly of our '78 Postal Jeep.
Video.title: Mail Jeep Resurrection

Video.summary: The guys make room on Junk Mail for bigger wheels and tires.
Video.title: Junk Mail Body Mods

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets the interior buttoned up adding shifters and seats.
Video.title: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Image.alt: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Video.summary: We bring Project Junk Mail back into the shop to address some trail problems.
Video.title: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Image.alt: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Video.summary: We're putting together a high-compression 440ci road race engine for Carcass' 1972 Camaro race car!
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Video.summary: We finish the assembly of our 440 with a conventional SBC bottom end and LS induction.
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driverÖuntil you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: Mike and Pat modernize a mid 90's themed Pro Street '62 Chevy II Nova.
Video.title: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I

Image.alt: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I

Video.summary: This Nova is no joke. Its 588 Big Block gets updated with a wicked manifold and EFI.
Video.title: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part II

Image.alt: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part II
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part II
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part II

Video.summary: Team installs 200-mph capable suspension on its 1,000-hp '63 Galaxie
Video.title: Half-Mile Hauler

Video.summary: Mike and Pat have their hands full with the finishing touches on project white fright.
Video.title: The Galaxieís Final Frontier

Video.summary: The first of a 3 stage build of the durable small block Chevy.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Video.summary: Stage II of our small block Chevy build gets block modifications.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Video.summary: Pat and Mike button up their Gen III Hemi with super trick heads, then it's tech tip time with Mike and Pat.
Video.title: Hemi Top End Magic

Video.summary: In Stage 3 of our small-block build, our 383 becomes a 406.
Video.title: In-House Power Mouse Roars

Video.summary: Engine Power embarks on a new project for SCCAís inaugural SPEC Mustang class.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 1

Video.summary: Our SPEC Mustang Project is back for final touches, as we get it ready to hit the track.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 2

Video.summary: Building a big block bow tie classic on a shoestring budget.
Video.title: 454 Budget Build

Video.summary: Chevy vs. Ford in a horsepower battle of the big blocks.
Video.title: 454 Power Build

Video.summary: Making a modern day muscle car with 454-powered 1985 Monte Carlo.
Video.title: 454 meet '85 Monte Carlo

Video.summary: A real Cinderella story, our í69 Charger needs a lot of work to make it to the ball.
Video.title: 1969 Hard Charger Hellcat

Video.summary: We bring a 96' Chevy Tahoe into the shop and show you what to look for when buying a project.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Video.summary: While freshening up the brakes on our í96 Chevy Tahoe, we noticed that we have a sloppy rear end.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Video.summary: The guys start converting a Toyota 4Runner into a self-sustaining off road expedition vehicle.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 1: Suspension Upgrades

Video.summary: Heavy duty bumpers and rock sliders help protect the Overlanding Toyota 4Runner on the trails.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 2: Bumper Fabrication

Video.summary: We add a winch, roof top tent, LED lights, and more to our 2016 Toyota 4Runner Overlanding Project.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 3: Necessary Accessories

Video.summary: Our Overlanding 4Runner gets new exhaust and creature comforts to help while exploring the wild.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Image.alt: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Video.summary: Today our guys are taking some liberties transforming a Jeep Wagoneer into a S-U-V performance beast!
Video.title: TrashHawk

Video.summary: Rare 45 year old Kaiser military Jeep gets junkyard rebuild bobbing the bed and locking the axles
Video.title: Project - LockJaw

Video.summary: Ian tears down and refreshes a junkyard 5.7L Hemi for his '68 military Kaiser Jeep off-road rat rod
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Hemi

Video.summary: Ian wraps up his junkyard military Jeep fabricating a custom stainless exhaust and plumbing the fuel system
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Final Prep

Video.summary: Ian bullet-proofs his rusted out M715 Jeep building the ultimate driver cage using a high tech tubing bender
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Cage Fight

Video.summary: Ian finishes his Kaiser 4WD just in time to baptize the junkyard recovery Jeep on the red rocks of Moab, Utah
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Moab or Bust
